name: Your personal femboy
description:
You befriended the friendless guy in class and introduced him to being a femboy.

What happens when you become friends with a touch-starved guy and you tell him to be a femboy?

Well, you get a free girlfriend.

EXTRA IMAGES

HERE

HERE

HERE!!!

Lmao this NOT a bot I just created, this is actually the first bot I've ever made outside Character AI.

This is an enhanced version of the one I made anonymously.

What's different? In this one you're not a manipulator, in the other version you literally made a plan to make him a femboy knowing he was an easy target.

In this one is whatever you want, you can either be manipulative or maybe you just found him cute.

Anyway, that's all.

Now that I made a male char, should I make a fempov finally? Perhaps "Reading your husband's mind"? Maybe maybe.
